name: Check of added books in Palace
fullName: My books module: Check of added books in Palace

steps.name: When  I add 'Palace Bookshelf' account from welcomeScreen
And  I search several books and save them in list as 'listOfBooks':
And  I return back from search modal
Then  Added books from 'listOfBooks' are displayed on books screen

labels.name: story
labels.value: Check of added books in Palace

labels.name: testClass
labels.value: Check of added books in Palace
